goals.objective: Execute plans/008-hardware-accelerated-transcode.md in /Users/neyako/freeframed as one delivery goal. Implement hardware-accelerated H.264 encoder selection for the FFmpeg transcoder: create packages/transcoder/hwaccel.py, thread transcode_hwaccel and transcode_vaapi_device through apps/api/config.py and apps/api/tasks/transcode_tasks.py, update packages/transcoder/ffmpeg_transcoder.py with hardware backend selection and one software fallback, add apps/api/tests/test_transcoder_hwaccel.py, document TRANSCODE_HWACCEL and TRANSCODE_VAAPI_DEVICE in apps/api/.env.example, and update plans/README.md row 008. Preserve software HLS command flags, package boundary, and only in-scope files. Success criteria: pytest apps/api/tests passes; import sanity for hwaccel and settings works; grep checks from the plan pass; no apps.api import in packages/transcoder; real-surface CLI/tmux evidence captures the done criteria and cleanup receipts; final reviewers approve.

successCriteria.scenario: Auxiliary CLI: capture RED then GREEN focused proof. Run python3 -m pytest apps/api/tests/test_transcoder_hwaccel.py -q before implementation and after implementation. PASS iff pre-change output fails for missing test/module behavior, and post-change output exits 0 with at least 7 tests passed.
